caption: The video features a static graphic set against a vibrant, swirling background of bright green and yellow tones that resemble flowing paint or liquid. Centered in the frame is a square grey album art cover depicting a geometric pattern of lines and circles. The text "Fibonacci 24/7" is written in white across the center of this square, with the name "Larry Pesavento" printed in a smaller white font below it. Directly beneath the album art, the words "FIBONACCI 24/7" appear in bold white capital letters. At the bottom of the screen, a blue rectangular button contains the word "SUBSCRIBE" in white capital letters. There are no people or movement present in the scene; the visual elements remain completely identical and stationary across all frames.
